creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tried to investigate this further and I think this upstream commit is related:

https://github.com/libressl-portable/openbsd/commit/275ef90f1110d91ccbcb0a78ee5c6fdd5e021938

(this commit was backed out and then added again with minor changes)

I don't know much about threading libraries to really go any further, but i suspect this code acts up when statically linked in acme-client.

Unluckily simply reverting that is not working, other problems come out, most probably due to other related changes in the library made at a later time.

I think we need someone with solid pthreads knowledge to look at this.
